features.name: Hit Dice
features.description: 1d8 per druid level

features.name: Proficiency in Druidic
features.description: Druids are proficient in the Druidic language.

features.name: Wild Shape
features.description: Can assume the form of a beast. This ability increases in power as you gain levels in this class.

features.name: Nature Empathy
features.description: You can communicate with plants and animals, and they tend to be friendly toward you.

features.name: Life Domain Spellcasting (Optional Feature)
features.description: Druids have the option of casting spells from the Life domain.

features.name: Wild Shape
features.description: At 2nd level, you can use your action to polymorph into a Beast or a Plant of your choice that is not a familiar. You retain your alignment and any traits that aren't defined by your form.

features.name: Spellcasting (Druid)
features.description: You can cast druid spells as described in the spellcasting class feature. This trait replaces the spellcasting class feature from the base class you selected at 1st level.

features.name: Spellcasting Ability
features.description: Wisdom is your spellcasting ability for druid spells. You draw upon the power of nature to cast these spells and gain an attunement to nature. Use Wisdom whenever you use a spell to cast magic. Additionally, you can use your Wisdom modifier when setting the saving throw DC for a druid spell you cast and when making an attack roll with one.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: You draw on the wild magic of nature to cast spells.

features.name: Wild Shape (1 action)
features.description: You can use your action to polymorph into a beast you know.

features.name: Shapeshifting Spellcasting
features.description: You can now use Wild Shape as a bonus action.

features.name: Nature's Ward
features.description: Your connection with nature grants you magical defenses, reducing certain damage types.

features.name: Druid Circle (Proficiency)
features.description: Choose an druid circle and gain its features.

features.name: Favored Enemy (1 enemy)
features.description: You gain expertise in one type of creature and can sense their presence.

features.name: Druid Circle (Specialization)
features.description: Choose a specialized feature from your chosen circle.

features.name: Eldritch Invocation: Natural Recovery
features.description: Your connection to nature allows you to recover quickly from spells and injuries.

features.name: Druidcraft
features.description: Can cast druidcraft at will.

features.name: Shape DC +4, +8, etc.
features.description: Can shape one natural object into another, limited by level.

features.name: Wild Shape (1 action)
features.description: Can transform into a beast or humanoid. Duration varies by class level.

features.name: Favored Enemy
features.description: Gain advantage on Wisdom(Perception) checks to find the favored enemy.

features.name: Nature Empathy
features.description: Understand and speak the language of beasts as well as read their thoughts under certain conditions.

features.name: Wild Shape (2 actions)
features.description: Same features as level 3, but can use twice per long rest.

features.name: Druid Circle +1
features.description: Choose a circle that grants additional benefits and spells. Some circles have prerequisites.

features.name: Nature's Ward
features.description: Gain temporary hit points when you cast druid spells of 3rd level or higher.

features.name: Wild Shape (3 actions)
features.description: Same features as level 8, but can use three times per long rest.

features.name: 游泳速度
features.description: 部分信息在下一页
